source.body_text_sample:
We value your privacy

We at Omniactive Health Technologies use cookies to enhance browser experience, serve personalized ads/content and analyze traffic. By choosing below tabs, you can set your consent preferences in terms of data collection by various categories of cookies. For more details please refer to our Privacy Policy / Cookies Policy

Reject Optional Cookies
Accept All

Build Your Career at OmniActive
Our culture

A company is only as good as the environment it fosters, and at OmniActive, we know that each and every employee is critical to our success. We believe trust, integrity, and respecting individuality within a group setting is paramount in developing true team spirit. Our Omni culture is built on four pillars.

 

Act like an owner  Proactively identify problems and solve them
Collaboration Reach-out, align and partner with team members who are essential to our success
Be agile Be hands-on and actively engaged in our roles
Go beyond Always be ready to challenge the status quo
A diversified global team

OmniActive operates with global teams over three continents and 400+ employees who collaborate together on a customer-focused approach. We have offices in New Jersey, USA; operations, manufacturing, and R&D centers in several locations across India and remote employees in Europe.

Visit our contact page for all locations
Perks and benefits of working at
